children.name: hwWlanRadioQueryPowerlevelTable
children.description: This table is used to query the maximum power level for specified channel and bandwidth.

children.name: hwWlanRadioQueryPowerlevelEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwWlanRadioQueryPowerlevelApMac, hwWlanRadioQueryPowerlevelRadioId, hwWlanRadioQueryPowerlevelChannel, and hwWlanRadioQueryPowerlevelBandwidth.

children.name: hwWlanRadioQueryPowerlevelRadioId
children.description: This object indicates the radio ID.

children.name: hwWlanRadioUncontrolAPInfTable
children.description: This table is used to query rogue AP information.

children.name: hwWlanRadioInfoTable
children.description: This table is used to query RF information, including channel, power, number of sent and received packets, and number of users.
